summary: Story Series Engine testing complete. All 8 backend API endpoints verified: create, my-series, get-series, plan-episode, generate-episode, suggestions, update-memory, episode-status. All endpoints correctly require authentication (return 401 without token). State machine enforcement verified (planned→generating→ready/failed). Frontend verified: 3 pages load correctly (/app/story-series, /app/story-series/create, /app/story-series/:seriesId). Series Timeline page has all 4 zones: episode timeline, action zone (Continue/Twist/Stakes), AI suggestions, series info (characters/world/hooks). Navigation between pages works. AI Suggestions refresh works and returns 4 suggestions.
critical_code_review_comments: story_series.py: All 8 API endpoints properly use Depends(get_current_user) for auth enforcement
story_series.py (line 541): State machine correctly enforces episode status - only 'planned' or 'failed' episodes can be generated
story_series.py (line 721-735): Strict validation - no READY status without real output_url (starts with http)
story_series.py (line 734): COMPLETED without output = FAILED (strict enforcement)
StorySeries.js: Uses data-testid='story-series-hub' for hub page
CreateSeries.js: All form inputs have data-testid attributes for testing
SeriesTimeline.js: All 4 zones have data-testid: episode-timeline, action-zone, suggestions-zone, series-info-zone
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 'Fox Forest' series (series_id: ea2bc4e8-454d-4f40-8415-f4383593904a)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Story Series Engine fully tested. 'Fox Forest' series has 3 episodes: Episode 1 (failed), Episode 2 (planned), Episode 3 (planned). The test series has characters (Jasper, Luna, Roo) and world (Magic Fox Forest). AI suggestions endpoint uses LLM and returns 4 suggestions with direction_type (continue/twist/stakes/custom). create-series and plan-episode endpoints use LLM calls that take ~10-15 seconds. generate-episode creates real pipeline jobs. Episode status polling implemented in frontend.

POST_create_series.evidence: Returns 422 for missing fields, endpoint accepts valid parameters with LLM integration

GET_my_series.evidence: Returns user's active series with latest_episode info and next_hook

GET_series_details.evidence: Returns full series details including episodes, character_bible, world_bible, story_memory

POST_plan_episode.evidence: Returns 404 for invalid series, accepts direction_type parameter

POST_generate_episode.evidence: Returns 404 for invalid episode, state machine enforces planned/failed only

POST_suggestions.evidence: Returns 4 AI-generated suggestions with title, description, direction_type

GET_episode_status.evidence: Returns status (planned/generating/ready/failed), strict validation - no ready without output_url

auth_enforcement.evidence: All 8 endpoints return 401 'Not authenticated' without token

state_machine.evidence: Episodes can only be generated from planned/failed status. Status transitions: planned→generating→ready/failed

frontend_my_series_page.evidence: Loads at /app/story-series, shows series cards with episode count, genre, date

frontend_create_series_page.evidence: Loads at /app/story-series/create, has title input, prompt textarea, genre/audience/style selects

frontend_series_timeline_page.evidence: Loads at /app/story-series/:seriesId with 4 zones: episode-timeline, action-zone, suggestions-zone, series-info-zone

frontend_navigation.evidence: Navigation between all 3 pages works correctly, back arrows work
